productDisplayName: Fila Men Redemption Black Sports Shoes
description: Lightweight trainers for the lightweight runner is how the 'running Times' labels this Redemption fila shoe. The low top high performance design is best suited to quietly cater to all your running needs. Need we mention how great this sporty shoe looks with jeans?UpperMeshed upper with strategically placed synthetic overlays for absolute durability lightweight and mesh for breathable comfortPadded and meshed collar and tongue for in-step comfortLace-up system for a snug, customised FitOutsole reinforced onto the toe to act as a heel guardMidsoleEVA midsoleOutsoleCurved midfoot and a TPU outsoleMultidirectional lugs and grooves for absolute grip and traction, with a decoupled heelShoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
